$comment: Platform baseline auto-derived by `cowork-harness sync` from a live Claude Desktop install + app.asar. VOLATILE per-release facts only. Regenerate per release; review the diff. Captured 2026-06-12 on macOS arm64.

agentBinary.$comment: There is NO npm path — the Linux/arm64 ELF is bind-mounted from this staged Desktop install (or COWORK_AGENT_BINARY). npmPackage/preferReuseStaged removed (Q1).

mounts.name: projects
mounts.purpose: selected work folders (a Space) — delete denied by default (asar IX)

mounts.name: outputs
mounts.purpose: session outputs/artifacts — delete denied by default (asar IX); rwd only when approved

network.$comment_allow: Derived from asar vmAllowedDomains() + firewallAlso + config.json:coworkEgressAllowedHosts. statsig* host normalized; verify exact statsig endpoint per release.

bgEnvStrip.$comment: Vars Cowork strips before spawning the in-VM agent (≥2.1.160 = 12 vars incl CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN). The harness mirrors this strip so skills can't rely on host env that Cowork removes.

provenance.$comment: eipcChannelUuid is per-build; recorded for provenance only — the harness does not use Desktop IPC.
